Jacobus Cornelis Meyer

Trompe l'Oeil Still Life
by Jacobus Cornelis Meyer
Netherlands · c. 1754 · pen and ink, point of brush and black ink wash, watercolor and gouache
←Possibly Veracruz, Mexico Charles Meynier→
